---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description"
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Clear and concise description of the requested feature.

## Use Case / Motivation

Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

**Example:**
Users want to [specific action] so they can [desired outcome].

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include:
- High-level overview
- User experience (how would users interact with this?)
- Technical considerations (if any)

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternative approaches or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references:
- Links to similar features in other tools
- Screenshots or diagrams
- Related issues or discussions

## Acceptance Criteria

What would make this feature complete?
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Implementation Considerations

If you have thoughts on implementation:
- Affected services (frontend, API, worker, detector)
- Database changes needed (yes/no)
- Breaking changes (yes/no)
- Performance considerations

---

**Checklist:**
- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] I have provided a clear description
- [ ] I have explained the use case
